# Rental Agency Finder
> The first European-wide directory for finding, comparing, and reviewing rental agencies.

Rental Agency Finder helps tenants find trustworthy rental agencies across 36 European countries and 64 cities. Unlike property listing sites (Airbnb, Booking.com, Flatio), we focus on the agencies themselves. Users can browse 4,253 agencies by country, city, and rental type (short-term, mid-term, long-term), read reviews from real tenants, and access contact details.

## Key pages
- Homepage: https://www.rentalagencyfinder.com/
- Browse agencies: https://www.rentalagencyfinder.com/agencies/
- For agencies (pricing): https://www.rentalagencyfinder.com/for-agencies/
- Blog: https://www.rentalagencyfinder.com/blog/
- About: https://www.rentalagencyfinder.com/about/
- Contact: https://www.rentalagencyfinder.com/contact/

## Interactive tools
- Rental Cost Calculator: https://www.rentalagencyfinder.com/tools/rental-cost-calculator (estimate total move-in costs across 20 European countries with legally sourced deposit limits, agency fee rules, utility setup, and insurance estimates)
- Deposit Law Comparison: https://www.rentalagencyfinder.com/tools/deposit-law-comparison (compare rental deposit laws across 30 European countries: maximum limits, refund deadlines, protection schemes, interest requirements, all with legal citations)
- Agency Scoring Methodology: https://www.rentalagencyfinder.com/tools/agency-scoring-methodology (transparent 7-criteria rating system: response time 25%, fee transparency 20%, tenant reviews 15%, language support 15%, listing quality 10%, contract clarity 10%, digital experience 5%)
- Find the Right Agency: https://www.rentalagencyfinder.com/tools/find-an-agency (interactive 5-question decision tree matching renters to the right agency type based on duration, budget, language, relocation status, and property needs)
- Contract Clause Checklists: https://www.rentalagencyfinder.com/tools/contract-templates (bilingual rental contract clause reference in 5 languages: German, French, Spanish, Italian, Dutch. 15 clauses per language with English translations, legal sources, and status badges)

## Coverage
- 36 European countries
- 64 cities
- 4,253 rental agency listings
- 100 blog posts (city guides, country guides, niche audience guides, and a comprehensive European rental guide)
- Structured FAQs for 19 major cities with FAQPage schema
- Sort by rating, name, or reviews; filter by rental type

## Blog content
- 1 comprehensive European rental agency guide
- 19 city-specific guides (Barcelona, Berlin, Lisbon, Paris, Amsterdam, Rome, Athens, Madrid, Prague, London, Dublin, Vienna, Budapest, Stockholm, Copenhagen, Brussels, Zurich, Helsinki, Edinburgh)
- 10 country-level rental market guides (Germany, France, Spain, Italy, Portugal, Netherlands, Greece, Austria, Sweden, Switzerland)
- 70 niche audience guides (tenant rights summary, renting with children, senior renting, student housing, digital nomad rentals, expat relocation, pet-friendly rentals, furnished apartments, family rentals, seasonal rentals, corporate housing, accessible rentals, luxury rentals, co-living spaces, retirement housing, budget rentals, remote work visa rentals, short-stay Airbnb alternatives, relocation services, renting without credit history, mid-term rentals, renting as a couple, utility setup, rental scam prevention, tenant insurance, rental deposit rights, landlord-tenant disputes, rental contracts explained, moving to Europe checklist, flatsharing, rent negotiation, subletting, first apartment, pet deposit rules, furnished vs unfurnished, seasonal pricing, energy efficiency ratings, tenant rights/eviction, agency fees, rent increase rules, guarantor requirements, rental market outlook 2026, renting as freelancer, condition reports, cross-border commuter rentals, visa requirements for renters, rental tax deductions, shared housing rights, utility contracts, rental notice periods, renting as non-EU citizen, energy performance certificates, month-to-month vs fixed-term leases, rental market outlook 2026, joint tenancy for couples, how agency fees work, furnished vs unfurnished comparison, best neighbourhoods for expats, how to get deposit back, rental reference letters, internet and broadband setup, move-in inspection checklist, mould and damp rights, renting with pets breed restrictions, noise complaints and quiet hours, parking and storage rights, tenant associations and unions, renovations and modifications, rental market red flags)

## Countries covered
Spain, Portugal, Italy, Greece, France, Germany, Netherlands, United Kingdom, Ireland, Belgium, Austria, Switzerland, Czech Republic, Poland, Hungary, Croatia, Slovenia, Malta, Cyprus, Sweden, Denmark, Norway, Finland, Estonia, Latvia, Lithuania, Romania, Bulgaria, Slovakia, Luxembourg, Iceland, Serbia, Montenegro, Albania, North Macedonia, Turkey.

## For agencies
Rental agencies can list for free or subscribe to paid plans (Starter EUR 29/mo, Advanced EUR 79/mo, Pro EUR 199/mo) for featured placement, verified badges, referral leads, and blog coverage.

## Contact
info@rentalagencyfinder.com
